upstreamInputs.vision: A task system that thinks alongside me — surfacing what matters most each day from everything I've committed to, learned, and reflected on.
upstreamInputs.whereToPlay: Single user (Michael), CLI + mobile interface + /morning skill integration. Tasks, priorities, relationships, and context in one owned system.
principles: Landscape over directives — show the full picture, let me decide
Frictionless capture, rich context later — one-liners in, enrichment during planning
Deep integration over standalone value — composable pieces that optimize individually
jtbdNow: Reflect and reshape in one flow

proposedApproach.name: Headless Brain
proposedApproach.formFactor: CLI-first task backend on Supabase, no frontend in V1
proposedApproach.howToWin: A CLI-first task backend on Supabase that Claude Code and agents can read/write natively — no frontend needed because any UI can be generated on demand.

jtbdConnections.jtbd: Reflect and reshape in one flow

noGos: No natural language date parsing in V1
constraints: Must run alongside Todoist during transition
Must be accessible from any machine (Supabase, not local files)
Must produce JSON output for all commands
Must share Supabase instance with Morning Brew
CLI capture must complete in under 5 seconds

behavioralEvals.statement: Michael captures 2+ tasks on each weekday via the td CLI or chat bridge
When the system proposes related tasks or reframings, Michael acts on the suggestions
behavioralEvals.success_criteria: Score of 0.6 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

behavioralEvals.jtbd: Reflect and reshape in one flow
behavioralEvals.statement: After completing evening recap, Michael completes tomorrow's plan in the same session on mobile
behavioralEvals.success_criteria: Score of 0.8 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

behavioralEvals.statement: Michael engages with AI priority challenges — reprioritizing tasks or explicitly confirming after devil's advocate pushback
behavioralEvals.success_criteria: Score of 0.3 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

behavioralEvals.statement: Planning sessions produce relationship-driven backlog churn — merges, deletes, and resurfaced tasks
behavioralEvals.success_criteria: Score of 0.8 or higher for 2 consecutive weeks

primary.name: Priority concentration trend
primary.measurement: this_week_p0p1_ratio >= last_week_p0p1_ratio (1 if improved or held, 0 if declined)

primary.name: Recap momentum tone
primary.jtbd_link: Reflect and reshape in one flow
primary.measurement: LLM scores each evening recap 0-1 on forward-momentum language, weekly average

guardrailEvals.statement: System must never add complexity that threatens daily usage
guardrailEvals.fail_condition: Daily usage drops below 4 of 5 weekdays in any given week
